Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I'm pleased to see that the classical music section had such a vast selection...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't expect this store to be so well stocked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I had no idea there were so many different artists and songs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, unlike the classical genre, it seems that most music today is completely new and original.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, with so many different artists and styles of music, how do people choose their favorites?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4001 0 0}Would you mind telling me who your favorite musical artist is?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}I just wanted to listen to the same music you do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems embarrassed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали значно ближчими сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4083 0 0}{f 5 13 4 15 5}Well, I'm not very familiar with today's popular music, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}...Wait, didn't I ask you first?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems to be having fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я дізнався про неї трохи більше сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you always have headphones around your neck...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So then, if not music, what are you listening to? Audio books?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru seems puzzled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми не стали ближчими сьогодні...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}All right. Instead of just standing around, should we grab a quick bite before going back?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ramen, burgers, takoyaki... or something else... It's a tough call.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After enjoying a meal together,[n]we headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
